vulnerabilities.description: Missing security middleware configuration. The application does not include Helmet middleware for setting secure HTTP headers, and there's no mention of CORS configuration with a whitelist.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate Helmet and configure CORS with a trusted origins whitelist.

vulnerabilities.description: Lack of rate limiting. The system does not implement rate limiting, which is essential to prevent abuse and control the number of requests to the server.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add rate-limiting middleware to manage the number of requests per unit time as configured by environment variables.

vulnerabilities.description: No mention of RBAC/ABAC middleware for access control. Although JWT is used for authentication, there is no implementation of role-based access control or attribute-based access control for authorization.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement RBAC/ABAC middleware to ensure secure access based on user roles and permissions.
